release_check: README, CHANGELOG, MANIFEST, workbook, and ZIP all use the same version.
MANIFEST.csv lists every release file with category and description.
master_field_database.csv exists and row count is recorded.
Workbook opens and matches the release version.
Scope/non-scope remains aligned with public reference purpose.
Observation lifecycle and release workflow files are present.
Public contributor templates are present and usable by non-programmers.
Normal commit-ready ZIP preserves repository folders.
Release validation script passes or manual validation is documented.
No cookies, tokens, private account IDs, or proprietary app internals are included.
